ai_disclosure: Content developed with AI assistance. Reviewed and approved by the author.
audience: Adult users (18+) in academic or professional contexts
name: AUGMANITAI Research Programme - Central Portal
description: Central landing page for the AUGMANITAI research programme by Andreas Ehstand. Portal connecting 9 sister corpora exploring the phenomenology of human-AI interaction. Aggregates canonical identifiers (ORCID, Wikidata, DOI) and routes visitors to compendium, periodic table, atlas, knowledge graph, and PERMANITAI framework resources.

referencePublication.name: AUGMANITAI Research Programme: terminology and phenomenology of human-AI interaction
referencePublication.author: Andreas Ehstand
